"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it's important to be mindful of the sources of information you consume. Be cautious of sensational or unverifiable claims, and fact-check content before sharing it. Additionally, use social media platforms' built-in fact-checking tools and report suspicious content. It's also essential to maintain a critical thinking approach when engaging with others on social media, questioning opinions that seem too good (or bad) to be true. Finally, prioritize your own mental health by limiting your screen time and taking breaks from social media regularly. By adopting these practices, you can effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media."

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it's important to be mindful of the sources of information you consume. Be cautious of sensational or unverifiable claims, and fact-check content before sharing it. Additionally, use social media platforms' built-in fact-checking tools and report suspicious content. It's also essential to maintain a critical thinking approach when engaging with others on social media, questioning opinions that seem too good (or bad) to be true. Finally, prioritize your own mental health by limiting your screen time and taking breaks from social media regularly. By adopting these practices, you can effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it's important to be mindful of the sources of information you consume, fact-check content before sharing it, use social media platforms' built-in fact-checking tools, and maintain a critical thinking approach when engaging with others. Additionally, prioritize your own mental health by limiting your screen time and taking breaks from social media regularly. By adopting these practices, you can effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media.
